svg.title: PIR Intelligence Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing 5 stages from PIR input through NLP extraction, API search, semantic filtering, hybrid reranking, LLM report generation, and optional RAG follow-up

g.text: spaCy NER · place names, entities, orgs
KeyBERT keywords · stop-word removal → multi-query search API → 100 docs
Embed PIR + article summaries with BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5
Structured summary + citation links printed to terminal
Full article text chunked + embedded nightly
"Tell me more about X" → top-k retrieval → LLM answer
